tools.name: add_meal
tools.description: Adds a meal with calories, macros (protein, carbs, fat), fiber, sugar, and optional notes. Timestamp is server-generated.

tools.name: update_meal
tools.description: Updates an existing meal by ID. Only the owner can update their meal.

tools.name: get_meals_by_date
tools.description: Returns meals for a specific calendar date (UTC). Provide date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
